matches.x: PSALM CXXXIV,*: A Song of: degrees, An exhortation to pratsé God. EHOLD, bless ye the Lord, all ye servants of the Lord, which by night stand in the house of the Lord. 2 Lift: ap your aoe in the sanctuary, and bless the Lord. 8 The Lord that made heaven and - earth bless thee out of Zion. PSALM CXXXY. An exhortation to oe God—The vanity

And in Thee shall all families of the earth be blessed, And I will bless them that bless thee,
